hooks.command: TAB_NAME=$(zellij action dump-layout 2>/dev/null | grep 'tab name=.*focus=true' | sed 's/.*name="\([^"]*\)".*/\1/') && jq -r '.message' | xargs -I {} terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code: '"$(basename "$PWD")" -message '{}' -sound default -execute "open -a Ghostty; zellij --session $ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME action go-to-tab-name '$TAB_NAME'" -appIcon '/Applications/Ghostty.app/Contents/Resources/Ghostty.icns'
